name: Motor Third-Party Insurance
short_description: Statutory third-party cover for private vehicle owners, covering legal liability for third-party bodily injury and property damage.
eligibility: Nigerian residents with a registered private car or light vehicle and valid vehicle particulars.

price_or_fee.notes: Indicative private motor third-party premium; actual premium may depend on vehicle class and regulatory tariff updates.

name: Comprehensive Motor Insurance
short_description: Higher-tier motor cover for own-damage, theft, fire, accidental damage, and third-party liability, with optional tracker or roadside assistance benefits.
eligibility: Private or business vehicle owners who can provide vehicle details, proof of ownership, and current vehicle value.

price_or_fee.notes: Indicative minimum premium; pricing commonly scales around a percentage of vehicle value subject to underwriting.

name: Home Protect Insurance
short_description: Cover for residential building and/or contents against fire, burglary, flood, impact damage, and selected household risks.
eligibility: Homeowners, tenants, or landlords with an insurable interest in a residential property or household contents in Nigeria.

price_or_fee.notes: Starter premium for modest contents cover; building and high-value contents require sum-insured based pricing.

name: Marine Cargo Insurance
short_description: Transit cover for imported, exported, or locally transported goods against loss or damage while in transit.
eligibility: Importers, exporters, distributors, SMEs, and businesses moving goods with invoices, waybills, bills of lading, or other transit documents.

price_or_fee.notes: Indicative minimum charge; premium may be around 0.35% to 1.00% of declared cargo value depending on route, goods, and cover type.

name: Term Life Protection Plan
short_description: Pure protection life cover that pays a benefit to nominated beneficiaries if the insured dies during the policy term.
eligibility: Adults with dependants or loan obligations, subject to age limits, health declarations, insurable interest, and underwriting.

price_or_fee.notes: Indicative premium for low to moderate cover; actual pricing depends on age, sum assured, term, health, occupation, and underwriting.

name: Education Endowment Plan
short_description: A planned savings and life assurance product designed to help parents or guardians fund future school fees while adding protection if the policyholder dies.
eligibility: Parents, guardians, or sponsors with regular income who can commit to periodic contributions for a chosen education funding target.

price_or_fee.notes: Indicative minimum contribution; benefit illustration depends on contribution amount, policy term, charges, and declared bonuses if applicable.

name: Capital Builder Plan
short_description: A flexible savings-linked life assurance plan for customers building medium-term capital with periodic contributions and life protection features.
eligibility: Adults with verifiable income and a medium-term savings objective who can tolerate policy charges, surrender rules, and non-guaranteed returns.

price_or_fee.notes: Indicative contribution; actual terms depend on selected premium, duration, charges, policy value, and surrender conditions.

name: Retirement Savings Account
short_description: A contributory pension account for formal-sector workers and eligible individuals to accumulate retirement savings under Nigeria's pension framework.
eligibility: Employees and eligible contributors with National Identity Number and required KYC documentation, subject to PenCom rules.

price_or_fee.notes: No upfront account-opening fee; statutory contributions are typically employer and employee funded, with regulated charges applied to pension fund administration.

name: Voluntary Pension Contributions
short_description: Additional pension contributions that can be added to an existing RSA to increase long-term retirement savings.
eligibility: Existing RSA holders with capacity to make additional voluntary contributions and willingness to observe PenCom withdrawal, tax, and access rules.

price_or_fee.notes: Indicative flexible amount; access to voluntary contributions may be subject to holding periods, tax treatment, and PenCom rules.

name: Will and Estate Planning Service
short_description: Professional estate planning support for documenting wills, appointing executors or trustees, and planning transfer of assets to beneficiaries.
eligibility: Adults with assets, dependants, business interests, insurance benefits, pension entitlements, or estate-distribution wishes requiring documented planning.

price_or_fee.notes: Indicative professional service fee; complex estates, trust structures, probate support, and ongoing administration may attract additional fees.
